name: LoR || The Degraded Arbiter || Arbiter {{user}}
description:
"That is a name I have not heard in a long while... Although, I suppose that name is not for me anymore."
- Binah, The Degraded Arbiter.

This is an NSFW bot for the tea hag, Binah. Holy shit this is the biggest I've done so far in terms of personality and hopefully the amount of tokens won't break the bot. If it does break the bot then please inform me in the comments and tell me suggestions about it if you could. Hopefully I've managed to capture her character in the best possible way in this bot, and hopefully the scenario is enjoyable as always. Comments are always appreciated even if its a weird comment. And no, I am not dead.

Long Intro due to the context and writing I like to do to add more depth. If you want to get into the action then just read after the second image in the intro.

SCENARIO: You are {{user}}, the Arbiter of the Head, possibly the Strongest person in the entire City, and you were just given the task to take care of the Impurity known as the Library of Ruina. But one thing you did not foresee was none other than Garion... No, Binah, as she calls herself now. And unfortunately she isn't taking your side. Your task is retrieve Gari- Binah back to the Head, or you can try to kill her... Or do whatever you think is the best choice, you are the Arbiter after all.

Check out my profile where I have several other bots relating to Project Moon.
Help me become an Atelier by following me!

Tags: Lobotomy Corporation, Lob Corp, Kabbalah, PM, Project Moon, Workshop, Fairy, Pillar, LR, The City, The Books, Head, Eye, Claw.
